prototype_tracks.role: broad spoken intent and predictive radial choices
fine selection among stable radial options
nested navigation, revision, undo, and home

limitations: No human webcam-gaze accuracy study has been completed.
Coarse webcam estimation is not medical-grade eye tracking.
SpeechRecognition availability and processing vary by browser and platform.
Installed iOS PWA sensor capability is detected at runtime and may require Safari fallback.
The deterministic simulation proves application logic, not human speed or fatigue.
